query:
SELECT serviceExternalId, planName, serviceType, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, dataSource, providerName, discoveryNotes, customerExternalId
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost = 49.00 AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%'
ORDER BY customerExternalId
LIMIT 30;
